name: @yakcc-bench/b5-coherence
notes: This package.json is NOT in the pnpm workspace (pnpm-workspace.yaml only includes packages/* and examples/*).
@anthropic-ai/sdk is a bench-local dep per DEC-BENCH-B5-SLICE2-001 — it MUST NOT appear in the root package.json.
Install bench deps: pnpm --dir bench/B5-coherence install
The SDK is loaded via dynamic import() in llm-judge.mjs, gated on ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.
